hard_rules: AAMC/NRMP/ACGME raw tables are NEVER published publicly — derived/computed statistics only.
NRMP-derived public display requires NRMP publication review before going live (contact publicaffairs@nrmp.org).
ACGME DRB-derived public display requires ACGME written approval (stricter than general ACGME footer).
NUCC taxonomy code definitions/descriptions require commercial license before product incorporation.
NPPES is identity/location evidence only — NOT credential or license verification.
No individual provider (Type-1 NPI) data surfaces in any product.
No individual resident/fellow roster data from any source.

sources.caveats: Organization (Type-2) records only. No individual provider (Type-1) data. Identity and location evidence only — NOT credential or license verification. NUCC taxonomy codes embedded in NPPES require separate commercial license for taxonomy definitions/descriptions.
sources.product_rule: NPPES data surfaces institution identity and address signals only. Never display as credential verification. Taxonomy code-set definitions require NUCC commercial license before display.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. No individual provider data. Teaching hospital flag and ratings are derived signals.
sources.product_rule: Derived hospital attributes (teaching status, star rating, CCN) may appear in product with 'Source: CMS Hospital Compare' attribution.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. IME ratio and FTE counts are the derived signals used.
sources.product_rule: Derived teaching intensity signals (IME ratio, FTE) may appear in product with CMS attribution.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. Facility-level data only.
sources.product_rule: Derived facility attributes may appear in product with CMS attribution.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. Research payment signals are an academic strength proxy only.
sources.product_rule: Derived research payment rankings may appear with 'Source: CMS Open Payments' attribution.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. HPSA designation is geographic (ZIP/county). Use as J-1 waiver / Conrad 30 eligibility signal.
sources.product_rule: HPSA designation may appear in product as J-1 waiver eligibility signal with 'Source: HRSA HPSA' attribution.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. Geographic designation only.
sources.product_rule: Derived MUA signals may appear with HRSA attribution.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. County-level workforce aggregates.
sources.product_rule: Derived county workforce metrics may appear with HRSA AHRF attribution.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. Pipeline and field strength aggregates.
sources.product_rule: Derived NHSC statistics may appear with HRSA attribution.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. Awardee list is public record. FQHC GME programs — IMG-friendly primary care signal.
sources.product_rule: THCGME awardee status may appear in product as FQHC GME / underserved signal with HRSA attribution.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. Institution-level research funding aggregate. Not grant-specific exposure.
sources.product_rule: Derived NIH funding rank/tier may appear in product with 'Source: NIH RePORTER FY2024' attribution.

sources.caveats: AAMC personal/educational use terms. Commercial use requires data use agreement: datarequest@aamc.org. HARD RULE: raw tables NEVER published. Reproduced table layouts are AAMC IP. Only derived/computed statistics (e.g., 'X% of IM residents are IMGs, Source: AAMC ROR 2025') may appear in product.
sources.product_rule: Derived statistics only. Attribution required: 'Source: AAMC Report on Residents [year]'. Contact datarequest@aamc.org before any commercial deployment.

sources.caveats: Public ERAS participation statistics. No authentication required. ACGME program IDs sourced from here (NOT from FREIDA/ADS). Commercial use requires AAMC data use agreement. HARD RULE: raw tables never published.
sources.product_rule: Derived program counts and specialty distributions only. Attribution: 'Source: AAMC ERAS 2026 cycle'. Commercial: datarequest@aamc.org.

sources.caveats: AAMC personal/educational use. Commercial DUA required. Aggregate medical education statistics.
sources.product_rule: Derived statistics only with attribution. Commercial: datarequest@aamc.org.

sources.caveats: AAMC personal/educational use. Commercial DUA required. Physician workforce projections and trends.
sources.product_rule: Derived statistics only with attribution. Commercial: datarequest@aamc.org.

sources.caveats: ACGME DRB copyright notice states: 'No part of this publication may be reproduced or distributed without prior written approval.' This is STRICTER than the general ACGME footer which permits noncommercial reproduction. HARD RULE: any derived public display using DRB data requires ACGME written approval first. Do not publish DRB-derived statistics without review.
sources.product_rule: BLOCKED for public display until ACGME written approval obtained. Contact ACGME before any product use of DRB-derived statistics.

sources.caveats: ACGME footer: 'Reproduction and distribution with attribution for educational, noncommercial purposes is permitted.' Commercial use requires ACGME approval.
sources.product_rule: Noncommercial derived statistics with attribution permitted. Commercial: seek ACGME approval.

sources.caveats: Same as specialty updates. Noncommercial derived with attribution.
sources.product_rule: Derived statistics with ACGME attribution for noncommercial. Commercial: seek approval.

sources.caveats: NRMP terms: 'May be reprinted for noncommercial purposes with attribution.' HARD RULE: any NRMP-derived content for public display requires NRMP publication review before going live. Contact publicaffairs@nrmp.org.
sources.product_rule: BLOCKED for public display until NRMP publication review completed. Required before launch of any NRMP-derived public pages.

sources.caveats: Same NRMP terms. Contains IMG match probability statistics — high product value.
sources.product_rule: BLOCKED for public display until NRMP publication review. Contact publicaffairs@nrmp.org.

sources.caveats: Same NRMP terms. PD weighting factors — high product value.
sources.product_rule: BLOCKED for public display until NRMP publication review.

sources.caveats: Same NRMP terms.
sources.product_rule: BLOCKED for public display until NRMP publication review.

sources.caveats: Published for public transparency. J-1 sponsorship statistics. IMG certification aggregate data.
sources.product_rule: Derived IMG certification and J-1 statistics with attribution permitted.

sources.caveats: Public transparency data. Medical school recognition status by country.
sources.product_rule: Derived school recognition status with attribution.

sources.source_name: NUCC Health Care Provider Taxonomy Code Set
sources.caveats: NUCC taxonomy code set and definitions require a commercial license before incorporation into a commercial product. HARD RULE: taxonomy code values (numeric identifiers) embedded in NPPES are public, but the definitions/descriptions of those codes require NUCC license. Do NOT display taxonomy descriptions in any product without licensing.
sources.product_rule: BLOCKED: taxonomy code definitions/descriptions require NUCC commercial license. Contact NUCC before displaying specialty taxonomy descriptions. Numeric codes only may be used internally.

sources.caveats: Public statistics pages. Noncommercial with attribution standard.
sources.product_rule: Derived pass rate statistics with ABFM attribution.

sources.caveats: Public statistics. Noncommercial with attribution.
sources.product_rule: Derived statistics with ABEM attribution.

sources.caveats: Public statistics. Noncommercial with attribution.
sources.product_rule: Derived statistics with ABP attribution.

sources.caveats: Public statistics. Noncommercial with attribution.
sources.product_rule: Derived statistics with ABPN attribution.

sources.caveats: Public statistics. Noncommercial with attribution.
sources.product_rule: Derived statistics with ABS attribution.

sources.caveats: 7 PDFs from abim.org. Incapsula WAF blocked automated tools but not browser access. Public transparency statistics. Noncommercial/attribution standard. HARD RULE: raw tables never reproduced.
sources.product_rule: Derived pass rate statistics with ABIM attribution.

sources.caveats: Federal public domain. VA and military salary/workforce aggregates. No individual employee records.
sources.product_rule: Derived VA workforce size and compensation aggregates.
